---
title: "get_exchange_status"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `get_exchange_status()`

Get Exchange Status

## Usage

```r
get_exchange_status(demo = FALSE)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `demo` | Logical. Use demo environment if TRUE. Defaults to FALSE. |

## Value

A list with exchange status information:

- `exchange_active`: Whether the exchange is operational

- `trading_active`: Whether trading is currently enabled

## Description

Retrieves the current operational status of the Kalshi exchange.

## Examples

```r
## Not run: 
status <- get_exchange_status()
status$trading_active

## End(Not run)
```
